content:
🚀 agent | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a flexible and scalable software agent for managing and processing video streams from various camera sources for surveillance purposes.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source video surveillance management agent • Scalable and isolated component of the Kerberos.io stack • Supports IP cameras with RTSP H264/H265 streams • Can process streams from USB cameras, Raspberry Pi cameras, etc. (via camera-to-rtsp)
📖 Summary: The Kerberos Agent is an open-source, scalable video surveillance management system designed for IP cameras and other video sources. It allows for the processing and management of video streams, enabling features like motion detection and integration into larger surveillance setups.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
